ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial period */,
  "period_ending" TEXT /* Date when the period ends */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year of the period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the period starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the period ends */,
  "period_type" TEXT /* Type of the period (e.g., Quarterly, Annual) */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Indicates if the period is open for data entry and adjustments */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the period was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the period */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the period was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric (e.g., Net Income, Depreciation) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the financial metric */,
  "metric_category" TEXT /* Category of the financial metric (e.g., Income Statement, Balance Sheet) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the metric is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the metric */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data entry */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial period */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the financial metric for the period */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department associated with the financial data */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region associated with the financial data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the data entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the data entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES financial_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating activity */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial period */,
  "cash_flows" REAL /* Cash flows provided by or used in operating activities */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department associated with the operating activity */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region associated with the operating activity */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the operating activity */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the operating activity entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operating activity entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the operating activity entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operating activity entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operating_activities_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES financial_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operating_activities_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operating_activities_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "depreciation_details" (
  "depreciation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each depreciation entry */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial period */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of depreciation for the period */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Asset associated with the depreciation */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department associated with the depreciation */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region associated with the depreciation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the depreciation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the depreciation entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the depreciation entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the depreciation entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the depreciation entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("depreciation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_depreciation_details_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_depreciation_details_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_depreciation_details_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES financial_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "net_income_adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each net income adjustment */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the adjustment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the adjustment */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department associated with the net income adjustment */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region associated with the net income adjustment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the adjustment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the adjustment entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the adjustment entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the adjustment entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the adjustment entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_net_income_adjustments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_net_income_adjustments_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_net_income_adjustments_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES financial_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts_receivables" (
  "receivables_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accounts receivables change */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial period */,
  "change_amount" REAL /* Change in accounts receivables for the period */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Customer associated with the accounts receivables */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department associated with the accounts receivables */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region associated with the accounts receivables */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the accounts receivables */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the accounts receivables entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the accounts receivables entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the accounts receivables entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the accounts receivables entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("receivables_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_receivables_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES financial_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_receivables_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_receivables_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., CFO, Analyst, Admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region the user is associated with */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
